_disclaimer: Data sourced from Election Commission of India (eci.gov.in). Always verify current dates with official ECI sources before acting.

general_info.id_card_name: EPIC (Electors Photo Identity Card) — Voter ID Card
general_info.evm_info: India uses Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs) paired with Voter Verified Paper Audit Trail (VVPAT) for transparency.

alternative_id_documents: Bank / Post Office Passbook with Photograph
Smart Card issued by RGI under NPR
Service Identity Card (Central/State Govt / PSU / Public Limited Co.)
Health Insurance Smart Card issued under Ministry of Labour

registration_forms.Form 6: New voter registration / inclusion of name in electoral roll
registration_forms.Form 7: Objection to inclusion / deletion of entry
registration_forms.Form 8: Correction of entries / address change / replacement of EPIC

general_faqs.question: What is the Voter ID card called in India?
general_faqs.answer: The Voter ID card in India is officially called the EPIC — Electors Photo Identity Card. It is issued by the Election Commission of India.

general_faqs.question: What if I don't have my Voter ID on election day?
general_faqs.answer: The ECI allows 12 alternative identity documents at polling booths including Aadhaar, Passport, Driving License, PAN Card, MNREGA Job Card, and Bank Passbook with photo.

general_faqs.question: How do I register as a new voter?
general_faqs.answer: Fill Form 6 online at voters.eci.gov.in or visit your nearest BLO (Booth Level Officer). You must be 18+ and an Indian citizen.
